# clo_project_recipe (Data Source)

Fetches a recipe by name. Useful to resolve a recipe_id for the instance resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Resolve a recipe_id by name to pass to clo_compute_instance.
data "clo_project_recipe" "web" {
  project_id = "1e8ff0f7-0b8c-4ec5-a0a4-e30cea0db287"
  name       = "wordpress"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the desired recipe
- `project_id` (String) ID of the project that owns recipes

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `min_disk` (Number) Minimum disk size (Gb) required by the recipe
- `min_ram` (Number) Minimum RAM (Gb) required by the recipe
- `min_vcpus` (Number) Minimum number of vCPUs required by the recipe
- `recipe_id` (String) ID of the requested recipe
- `suitable_images` (List of String) IDs of images the recipe can be applied to
